question.text: What is the approximate 6-month USDINR futures price if spot is 83, India's rate is 7% p.a. and US rate is 5% p.a.?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** F = S × (1 + RINR × 0.5) / (1 + RUSD × 0.5) = 83 × (1.035) / (1.025) = 83 × 1.00976 = 83.8097 ≈ 83.81. **The Trap:** For periods less than 1 year, multiply the annual rate by the fraction of the year. **Cross-Exam Context:** Period-adjusted pricing is tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Quick estimate: F ≈ 83 + 83 × (0.07-0.05) × 0.5 = 83 + 0.83 = 83.83 (approximate).
